'''Productivity Day''' was a [[holiday]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The celebration highlighted the strong work ethic present in the sector, and celebrated hard work and the contribution of previous generations who made the sector prosperous. It fell between the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of [[Nelona]] and [[Helona]].<ref name="LE" />
